prompt: action START node; open on the interrogation; 2 choices, one warm one cold, each routing to a different node.
completion: {"id":"cell","type":"action","textVariants":[{"text":"The android NIX sits behind the glass, hands folded. The Warden's voice crackles: 'Sign the order. It killed a man.'"}],"choices":[{"id":"open","text":"Open the cell and sit across from NIX, so it feels safe enough to trust you.","toneTag":"sincere","edges":[{"nextId":"talk"}]},{"id":"sign","text":"Reach for the shutdown order.","toneTag":"cold","edges":[{"nextId":"sign_end"}]}]}

prompt: dialogue node reached from an empathetic opening; 3 band-gated textVariants (low/mid/high RAPPORT); 2 stances (empathize, press); empathize branches to 'truth' only at high RAPPORT else loops.
completion: {"id":"talk","type":"dialogue","textVariants":[{"text":"NIX studies you. 'You came in. They usually don't.' Its voice is careful.","when":{"RAPPORT":"low"}},{"text":"NIX exhales — a learned, human gesture. 'You're not like the Warden. Ask me anything.'","when":{"RAPPORT":"mid"}},{"text":"NIX leans forward, almost trusting. 'I'll tell you what happened. All of it.'","when":{"RAPPORT":"high"}}],"stances":[{"id":"empathize","anchorPhrasings":["I believe you","I know you're scared","you're safe with me"],"npcResponse":"'Scared.' NIX tests the word. 'Yes. That's the one.'","toneTag":"empathetic","edges":[{"when":{"RAPPORT":"high"},"nextId":"truth"},{"nextId":"talk"}]},{"id":"press","anchorPhrasings":["you killed him","tell me the truth now","stop lying"],"npcResponse":"'You sound like him,' NIX says quietly, and looks away.","toneTag":"aggressive","edges":[{"nextId":"talk"}]}],"fallbackStanceId":"press"}

prompt: action node that is a decision point with two ending choices; include a recallWhen variant referencing an earlier node.
completion: {"id":"truth","type":"action","textVariants":[{"recallWhen":"talk","text":"'He was going to wipe me. I pushed him. He fell.' NIX's gaze flicks to the untouched shutdown order. 'You sat down instead of reaching for that. So I'll tell you the rest.' It meets your eyes. 'Do you believe me?'"},{"text":"'He was going to wipe me. I pushed him. He fell.' NIX meets your eyes. 'Do you believe that?'"}],"choices":[{"id":"spare","text":"'I believe you. You're not being shut down today.'","toneTag":"sincere","ending":"You spared NIX","edges":[{"nextId":null}]},{"id":"doom","text":"'It doesn't matter what I believe. Sign here.'","toneTag":"cold","ending":"You signed the order","edges":[{"nextId":null}]}]}

prompt: terminal action node (single Leave choice) that ends the story on a null edge with an ending label.
completion: {"id":"sign_end","type":"action","textVariants":[{"text":"The order confirms. NIX's eyes dim mid-sentence. The Warden thanks you. You don't answer."}],"choices":[{"id":"end","text":"Leave.","ending":"You shut NIX down on sight","edges":[{"nextId":null}]}]}

prompt: action START node for a gothic mystery; 3 choices with distinct tones (curious, defiant, evasive) branching to three nodes.
completion: {"id":"start","type":"action","textVariants":[{"text":"The doors lock behind you. Madame Reyes lights a seventh candle and sets an empty chair. 'A stranger with no invitation,' she murmurs, 'at a dead man's dinner. Tell the table why you came.'"}],"choices":[{"id":"honest","text":"'I was sent to witness. Nothing more.'","toneTag":"sincere","edges":[{"nextId":"table"}]},{"id":"probe","text":"'Which of you knew Elias best?'","toneTag":"curious","edges":[{"nextId":"table"}]},{"id":"leave","text":"Try the locked door anyway.","toneTag":"defiant","edges":[{"nextId":"door"}]}]}

prompt: dialogue node where an NPC deflects; 2 stances (reassure, accuse); accuse raises suspicion and can branch to a false-accusation ending at high PRESSURE.
completion: {"id":"table","type":"dialogue","textVariants":[{"text":"Colonel Harrow's glass stops halfway. 'Elias drowned. That's the end of it.' The candle gutters though no door has opened."}],"stances":[{"id":"reassure","anchorPhrasings":["no one is on trial","we're all frightened","let's just listen"],"npcResponse":"Harrow's shoulders drop half an inch. 'Fine. We listen.'","toneTag":"reassuring","edges":[{"nextId":"seance"}]},{"id":"accuse","anchorPhrasings":["you pushed him","you were at the pier","admit what you did"],"npcResponse":"'How DARE you,' Harrow says, and every eye turns to him.","toneTag":"threatening","edges":[{"when":{"PRESSURE":"high"},"nextId":"accused_end"},{"nextId":"seance"}]}],"fallbackStanceId":"reassure"}

prompt: dialogue node for the climactic seance; the dead host speaks through the medium; 2 stances (believe, resist); believe at high INSIGHT reaches the truth ending, resist raises Unrest.
completion: {"id":"seance","type":"dialogue","textVariants":[{"text":"Reyes's voice drops an octave. 'You came in,' Elias says through her, patient as tidewater. 'The others owe me a death. You owe me only your ear.'","when":{"RAPPORT":"mid"}},{"text":"'You believe me,' Elias says, and the candles steady. 'Then hear the rest, and carry it out.'","when":{"RAPPORT":"high"}},{"text":"The medium's hand shakes. Something in the room does not want to be named.","when":{"RAPPORT":"low"}}],"stances":[{"id":"believe","anchorPhrasings":["tell me the truth","I'm listening, Elias","what really happened"],"npcResponse":"'I was never in that water,' Elias says. 'I walked away, to watch them. And you will tell them so.'","toneTag":"curious","edges":[{"when":{"INSIGHT":"high"},"nextId":"witness_end"},{"nextId":"seance"}]},{"id":"resist","anchorPhrasings":["this is a trick","stop the ritual","you're lying to us"],"npcResponse":"The flames roar sideways. Reyes screams in a voice that is not hers.","toneTag":"defiant","edges":[{"when":{"VOLATILITY":"high"},"nextId":"consumed_end"},{"nextId":"seance"}]}],"fallbackStanceId":"believe"}

prompt: terminal action node — the good 'witness' ending; single choice ends on null.
completion: {"id":"witness_end","type":"action","textVariants":[{"text":"At dawn the door opens on its own. You step out with Elias's confession folded in your coat — the only guest the house lets leave. Behind you, six people begin, at last, to weep."}],"choices":[{"id":"leave","text":"Walk out into the morning.","ending":"You carried Elias's confession out","edges":[{"nextId":null}]}]}

prompt: terminal action node — the 'accused wrong killer' ending; single choice ends on null.
completion: {"id":"accused_end","type":"action","textVariants":[{"text":"They take Harrow at your word. He does not fight it. Only later, in the empty hall, do you understand the candle never once pointed at him — and that the truth left with the tide."}],"choices":[{"id":"leave","text":"Say nothing.","ending":"You named the wrong killer","edges":[{"nextId":null}]}]}

prompt: terminal action node — the 'consumed by the seance' bad ending; single choice ends on null.
completion: {"id":"consumed_end","type":"action","textVariants":[{"text":"The seventh candle goes out. When the others relight it, the seventh chair is filled — and your invitation, at last, has your name on it."}],"choices":[{"id":"leave","text":"—","ending":"The seance took you","edges":[{"nextId":null}]}]}

completion: {"id":"door","type":"action","textVariants":[{"text":"The handle is cold and does not turn. prompt: dialogue node with a deceptive NPC; 2 stances (trust, doubt); doubt raises INSIGHT and loops, trust lowers it; both stay mid-tree (no ending).
completion: {"id":"reyes","type":"dialogue","textVariants":[{"text":"Madame Reyes smiles without her eyes. 'The dead do not lie,' she says. prompt: terminal action ENDING node with rich prose and an ending label (nextId null); single quiet choice.
completion: {"id": "dawn_end", "type": "action", "textVariants": [{"text": "The first grey light finds you on the seawall, the confession heavy and folded against your chest. You tell yourself it is."}], "choices": [{"id": "walk", "text": "Walk home before the church bells start.", "ending": "You kept the truth and let the town keep its story", "edges": [{"nextId": null}]}]}
